subject: Yamper, the electric dog Pokemon, resting happily in a flower field
description: A small, round, dog-like Pokemon lies or sits low in a meadow dense with yellow flowers and bright green foliage. The creature has a pudgy tan-cream body with darker brown markings, a wide open smile showing teeth, and round bright eyes giving it an overwhelmingly cheerful expression. The surrounding field is lush and sunlit, with soft blurred greens and yellows filling the background. The composition is grounded and cozy — this is a creature entirely at ease in its environment.
foreground: small round dog creature resting low in flowering grass
background: meadow of yellow flowers and green foliage in soft sunlight
emotion: joyful and relaxed, wide open smile, completely at ease
